raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "dark box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the dark box without contacting the adjacent light box; the cup in front of the light box does not obstruct the approach corridor to the dark box sides.",
    "Postcondition": "The dark box is laterally constrained between both end-effectors, preventing sliding while preparing a lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "dark box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The box is stabilized and there is enough clearance to apply inward normal forces on opposite side faces; the light box is not pressing against the dark box such that lifting would cause collision.",
    "Postcondition": "The dark box is securely held by both end-effectors and is no longer resting on the tabletop."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the dark box without contacting the adjacent light box; the cup in front of the light box does not obstruct the approach corridor to the dark box sides.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The dark box is laterally constrained between both end-effectors, preventing sliding while preparing a lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: The box is stabilized and there is enough clearance to apply inward normal forces on opposite side faces; the light box is not pressing against the dark box such that lifting would cause collision.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The dark box is securely held by both end-effectors and is no longer resting on the tabletop.
